```python
import urllib.request
import re

# 直接搜索Dutch Bros 2024年财报关键数据
urls_to_try = [
    ("SEC filings", "https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK=0001784679&type=10-K"),
    ("Yahoo Finance", "https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/BROS/financials"),
]

for name, url in urls_to_try:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
        response = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
        html = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        # 提取收入和毛利率
        revenue = re.search(r'(?:Total Revenue|Net Sales)[\s:]*\$?([\d,\.]+)', html, re.IGNORECASE)
        margin = re.search(r'Gross Margin[\s:]*([\d.]+)%', html, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"=== {name} ===")
        if revenue:
            print(f"Revenue: ${revenue.group(1)}")
        if margin:
            print(f"Gross Margin: {margin.group(1)}%")
        # 打印部分内容用于分析
        print(html[1000:3000])
        print("\n")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"{name}: Error - {e}\n")
